Action: Business Issuer creates credential offer and wallet performs initial issuance
Data:
- Credential offer deeplink
- DPoP binding key
- Initial batch of credentials
- Credential management ID

Action: Wallet repeats token refresh and credential renewal cycles up to 100 attempts
Data:
- Refresh token
- DPoP binding key
- Access token
- Token endpoint and credential endpoint URIs
- Nonce from server (for each cycle)
Expected Result: First 90+ renewal cycles succeed with HTTP 200 or HTTP 202 responses

Action: Issuer processes continuous renewal requests and applies rate limiting logic during cycles 90-100
Data:
- Continuous token refresh requests
- Continuous credential requests
- Rate limiting configuration on issuer
- Server-side request tracking
Expected Result: At least one renewal attempt fails with HTTP 429 Too Many Requests before maximum attempt limit is reached
